message:
feat(api,autograd,optim): add mixed precision autocast and GradScaler (frankentorch-iha)

Add torch.amp-equivalent mixed precision training support across three crates:

ft-api: Autocast context manager with enter/exit/nesting, with_autocast closure
API (panic-safe RAII), and maybe_autocast helper that down-casts higher-precision
floats when autocast is active. Includes 8 tests covering nesting, panic recovery,
passthrough, downcast, and upcast-rejection semantics.

ft-autograd: Add tensor_gradients_iter() for inspecting all gradients (needed for
overflow detection) and scaled_clone() for producing unscaled gradient reports.
Fix custom_function to produce Leaf nodes when grad is disabled or no input
requires grad, matching PyTorch's torch.no_grad() behavior.

ft-optim: Add GradScaler struct with PyTorch-equivalent defaults (scale=65536,
growth_factor=2, backoff_factor=0.5, growth_interval=2000). Implements scale_loss,
step (with overflow detection and gradient unscaling), and update (dynamic scale
growth). Includes 7 tests covering default config, disable passthrough, loss
scaling, unscaled gradient correctness, overflow skip, and growth interval.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
